population.label: Population
population.definition: County resident population from Census PEP.

county_violent_crime_rate.label: Violent crime rate
county_violent_crime_rate.definition: Index violent crimes per 100,000 (Kaplan UCR aggregated to county-year).
county_violent_crime_rate.source: Jacob Kaplan UCR Offenses Known V22

county_property_crime_rate.label: Property crime rate
county_property_crime_rate.source: Jacob Kaplan UCR Offenses Known V22

county_murder_rate.label: Murder rate
county_murder_rate.source: Jacob Kaplan UCR Offenses Known V22

county_robbery_rate.label: Robbery rate
county_robbery_rate.source: Jacob Kaplan UCR Offenses Known V22

county_aggravated_assault_rate.label: Aggravated assault rate
county_aggravated_assault_rate.source: Jacob Kaplan UCR Offenses Known V22

county_burglary_rate.label: Burglary rate
county_burglary_rate.source: Jacob Kaplan UCR Offenses Known V22

county_larceny_rate.label: Larceny rate
county_larceny_rate.source: Jacob Kaplan UCR Offenses Known V22

state_firearm_suicide_rate.label: State firearm suicide rate (joined down)
state_firearm_suicide_rate.definition: STATE-LEVEL firearm suicide rate, applied to every county in the state. No within-state variation.
state_firearm_suicide_rate.source: Firearm suicide / homicide v2 dataset (joined down by state)
state_firearm_suicide_rate.caveat: State value applied to every county. Not true county detail.

state_firearm_homicide_rate.label: State firearm homicide rate (joined down)
state_firearm_homicide_rate.definition: STATE-LEVEL firearm homicide rate, applied to every county in the state.
state_firearm_homicide_rate.source: Firearm suicide / homicide v2 dataset (joined down by state)
state_firearm_homicide_rate.caveat: State value applied to every county. Not true county detail.

state_ownership_fss.label: State FS/S ownership proxy (joined down)
state_ownership_fss.definition: STATE-LEVEL firearm-suicide-share proxy. Same value for every county in the state. Mechanically tied to suicide outcomes.
state_ownership_fss.caveat: State value applied to every county; tied to suicide outcomes.

share_white_nh.label: Share non-Hispanic white
share_white_nh.definition: Share of population non-Hispanic white alone (ACS 5y B03002).

share_black_nh.label: Share non-Hispanic Black
share_black_nh.definition: Share of population non-Hispanic Black alone (ACS 5y B03002).

share_hispanic.label: Share Hispanic
share_hispanic.definition: Share of population Hispanic or Latino, any race.

share_bachelors_plus.label: Share with bachelor's degree or higher (25+)
share_bachelors_plus.definition: Share of adults age 25+ with bachelor's degree or higher (ACS 5y; B15003 from 2012 onward, B15002 for 2009-2011).

median_hh_income_real_2024.label: Median household income (2024 USD)
median_hh_income_real_2024.definition: Census SAIPE median household income, deflated to 2024 dollars via CPI-U.

unemployment_rate.label: Unemployment rate
unemployment_rate.definition: BLS LAUS annual average unemployment rate (via USDA ERS mirror; 2024 not yet released).

pcpi_real_2024.label: Per-capita personal income (2024 USD)
pcpi_real_2024.definition: BEA per-capita personal income, deflated to 2024 dollars via CPI-U.

lawtotal.label: State firearm law count (joined down)
lawtotal.definition: Tufts state firearm law count, applied to every county in the state.

county_sworn_officers_per_100k.label: Sworn officers per 100,000 (county)
county_sworn_officers_per_100k.definition: Full-time sworn (peace-officer-status) law-enforcement personnel summed across reporting agencies in this county, divided by county population. Source: Kaplan LEOKA (openICPSR project 102180 V15) aggregated agency-level rows. 99.8% county-year coverage; missing only the same 5 small Alaska boroughs and Kalawao HI that have no Kaplan crime data.
